# Coastal Travel Company

> Coastal Travel Company is an editorial hotel photography studio based in Palm Beach, Florida. Founded by Laura Crain, the studio creates refined, story-driven photography and short-form video for luxury hotels, boutique resorts, and vacation rental properties. The studio specializes in editorial photography and cinematic short-form video that captures the feeling of a stay — not just the look — for use on Instagram, booking pages, websites, and paid advertising campaigns. Service area covers Palm Beach and the Southeast United States, with select Caribbean engagements.

## About the Studio

- [About Coastal Travel Company](https://coastaltravelcompany.com/about): Studio background, founder bio, creative approach, and the four-pillar methodology (natural movement, styled authenticity, thoughtful light, fashion-led storytelling).

## Services

- [Services Overview](https://coastaltravelcompany.com/services): Full list of studio offerings — editorial photography, short-form video (Reels/TikTok), lifestyle and detail capture, visual storytelling packages, and 3D property walkthroughs.

## Signature Collections (Packages & Pricing)

- [The Listing Upgrade](https://coastaltravelcompany.com/collections#listing-upgrade): One-day shoot for Airbnb and vacation rental hosts. Delivers 15–25 edited listing photos, 1–2 short video clips, full retouching, and usage rights for all major booking platforms. Starting from $400.
- [The Fashioned Weekend](https://coastaltravelcompany.com/collections#fashioned-weekend): Focused one-to-two day lifestyle shoot. Includes 40–60 edited lifestyle photos, 2–3 vertical Reels/TikTok clips, detail and amenity capture, and social + website usage rights. Starting from $1,200.
- [The Editorial Stay](https://coastaltravelcompany.com/collections#editorial-stay): Comprehensive two-to-three day editorial engagement covering the full property. Delivers 100–150 edited photos, 3–5 vertical Reels, architecture, interiors, lifestyle, food and beverage, and an ambient property clip. Starting from $2,500.
- [The Signature Story](https://coastaltravelcompany.com/collections#signature-story): Campaign-level creative engagement for luxury boutique hotels and resorts. Delivers 200+ edited photos, a hero brand film, 5+ Reels, campaign-level styling direction, full post-production, and all-channel rights including paid ads and press. Custom quoted from $4,500.

## Contact & Inquiries

- [Contact](https://coastaltravelcompany.com/contact): Project inquiry form. Ideal for hotels, resorts, and vacation rental owners in Palm Beach, Southeast United States, and the Caribbean.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://coastaltravelcompany.com/privacy): Data handling, cookie policy, and user rights.
